params._l2UniswapAddress: Aztec L2 contract that emits the swap messages.
params._registry: Aztec L1 registry contract on this chain.
params._router: Uniswap V3 SwapRouter (or compatible) on this chain.

swapPrivate(address,uint256,uint24,addre.notice: Same semantics as bundled UniswapPortal.swapPrivate but uses the         configurable router instead of the mainnet constant.
